results.requirement_text: The system shall require a cancellation reason when an approved booking is cancelled.

test_cases.title: Cancel approved booking with a reason
test_cases.objective: Verify that the system accepts a cancellation when a reason is provided for an approved booking.
preconditions: Configured prerequisite: an approved booking exists in the system.

steps.action: Submit a cancellation request for the approved booking providing a cancellation reason.
steps.expected_result: The system accepts the cancellation and records the provided reason.

test_cases.expected_result: Cancellation is processed successfully and the reason is stored.
assumptions: Assume that an approved booking can be identified and is available for cancellation.

traceability.coverage_item: Cancellation with a provided reason is accepted

test_cases.title: Cancel approved booking without a reason
test_cases.objective: Verify that the system rejects a cancellation when no reason is provided for an approved booking.
preconditions: Configured prerequisite: an approved booking exists in the system.

steps.action: Submit a cancellation request for the approved booking without providing a cancellation reason.
steps.expected_result: The system rejects the cancellation request and indicates that a reason is required.

test_cases.expected_result: Cancellation is not processed and appropriate validation feedback is given.
assumptions: Assume that an approved booking can be identified and is available for cancellation.

traceability.coverage_item: Cancellation without a reason is rejected

plans.requirement_text: The system shall require a cancellation reason when an approved booking is cancelled.

coverage_items.coverage_item: Cancellation with a provided reason is accepted
coverage_items.rationale: Verifies that the system allows cancellation when a reason is supplied.

coverage_items.coverage_item: Cancellation without a reason is rejected
coverage_items.rationale: Ensures the system enforces the requirement to provide a reason.
